description_long: This coupe car features a striking blue exterior with a highly stylized, aerodynamic body reminiscent of a sports car, accented by exaggerated rear fins and a low, aggressive stance. The front end is smooth and rounded, with sleek headlights and a wide, smiling grille. The cockpit is open, revealing a single red racing seat and a minimalist dashboard, suggesting a focus on performance and speed. The wheels are bold and red with whitewall tires, adding a playful yet sporty touch to the overall design. The rear of the car is characterized by dual tail lights, a central exhaust, and prominent fins that evoke a sense of motion even when stationary. The overall appearance is both futuristic and whimsical, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A blue, highly stylized coupe car with exaggerated fins, red racing wheels, and an open cockpit featuring a single red seat. Its design is sporty, futuristic, and playful.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, sleek headlights, and open cockpit with a visible red seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exaggerated rear fins, red wheels, and the open, low-profile cockpit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays dual tail lights, a central exhaust, and the dramatic rear fins flanking the car.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the bold fins, red wheels, and open cockpit design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
